title: MSc Data Science & AI
unis: TU Munich, RWTH Aachen, University of Mannheim
highlight: English-taught. Excellent job prospects in Berlin & Munich tech hubs.

title: MSc Mechanical Engineering
unis: RWTH Aachen, TU Berlin, University of Stuttgart
highlight: Germany's strongest engineering programs. Direct pathways into automotive & energy.

title: BSc Computer Science
unis: TU Darmstadt, University of Freiburg, Jacobs University
highlight: No tuition at most public unis. Strong English options in year 1–2.

title: Ausbildung in Mechatronics
highlight: Earn while you learn. 70% of Ausbildung graduates get hired by the same company.

title: MSc Electrical & Renewable Energy
unis: KIT Karlsruhe, TU Dresden, FAU Erlangen
highlight: Critical skills shortage. Fast track to Blue Card and residency.

title: Ausbildung in Nursing / Healthcare
highlight: Massive demand. German language support provided during training.

title: BSc Business & Management
unis: Frankfurt School, University of Mannheim, ESB Reutlingen
highlight: Great for students who want corporate careers or to start a business in Europe.

title: MSc Automotive Engineering
unis: RWTH Aachen, TU Munich, TU Braunschweig
highlight: Direct access to the heart of German automotive industry.
